title: Pulse — Project Intelligence
tagline: Internal Gantt platform for the Optimal team. Multi-view timeline, drag-and-drop persistence, Google OAuth with RLS.

title: Symphony Operations
tagline: Rule-based production scheduling engine for a $16M/yr commercial signage manufacturer. 11 departments, 9-endpoint API.

title: TGI Progressions Builder
tagline: Course player app for The Guitar Institute. 2 courses, drip-lock logic, Admin CRUD, YouTube edge function, 3 sales pages.

title: Full-Stack Intranet Platform
tagline: End-to-end intranet with RBAC, 14+ normalized DB models, NextAuth, and reusable component library.

title: JobFlow Notion Sync API
tagline: Idempotent sync pipeline in Go + FastAPI mirroring job data to Notion. Schema validation, retry logic, SQLite → PostgreSQL path.

title: Baseball Player Database
tagline: NoSQL database with optimized aggregation pipelines for 50K+ player records. 2× query performance improvement.
